claim_boundary: Material screening is assumption-based hypothesis triage only. It is not experimental validation, DFT proof, pack proof, aircraft design, or candidate ranking.
limitations: No material card is an audited measurement.
Rows missing voltage or capacity are intentionally blocked from energy estimates.
Engineering-bounded pack values are assumption diagnostics, not achieved performance.
Speculative carbon architectures, including hemp/bast-fiber carbon, are hypothesis tracking only.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Establishes a conservative incumbent reference lane for aviation requirement gaps.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Published lithium-ion family context exists, but this registry row is not an audited measurement.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Full-cell screening proxy for NMC/graphite family, not a universal cell rating.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Full-cell lithium-ion baseline translated through aviation pack overhead assumptions.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Intercalation full-cell screening proxy; not a parsed experimental record.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Safety and cost reference lane, expected to remain energy-limited for aircraft range.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Published LFP-family context exists, but no audited record is linked to this row.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Full-cell screening proxy for LFP family, not a product specification.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Full-cell LFP-family screening proxy translated through pack overhead assumptions.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Intercalation full-cell proxy using conservative voltage and capacity assumptions.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: High-energy incumbent reference lane for aviation pack requirement comparison.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Published NCA-family context exists, but no audited record is linked to this row.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Full-cell screening proxy for NCA family, not a product specification.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Full-cell NCA-family screening proxy translated through pack overhead assumptions.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: High-energy intercalation full-cell proxy for aviation gap context only.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Possible incremental energy improvement path if swelling and cycle-life penalties are solved.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Published silicon-anode context exists, but no audited aviation cell record is linked here.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Full-cell proxy for a silicon-graphite lithium-ion system; anode alone has no pack voltage.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Anode improvement hypothesis translated through a speculative full-cell proxy.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Silicon-rich anode capacity can be high, but full-cell energy is limited by cathode, binder, electrolyte, and swelling control.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Critical enabling component for multiple high-energy hypotheses, but safety and excess-lithium mass dominate.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.
material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Literature context exists; this row has no audited full-cell aviation measurement.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Anode-only row intentionally lacks full-cell voltage; energy estimate must be blocked.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Negative-electrode material only; not a standalone rechargeable full cell or pack.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Metallic lithium has high specific capacity, but anode-only capacity does not define cell energy.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Potential high-energy path if cycle life, electrolyte mass, safety, and power limits are solved.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Published Li-S context exists, but no audited aviation duty-cycle full-cell measurement is linked.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Sulfur conversion screening voltage, not an audited cell average.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Full-cell hypothesis requiring electrolyte, lithium excess, sulfur loading, and cycle-life accounting.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Sulfur conversion capacity is high, but complete cell energy is strongly reduced by electrolyte and lithium excess.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Useful abundance and cost comparator, likely energy-limited for aviation range.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Sodium-ion full-cell family proxy; not an audited aircraft battery measurement.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Sodium insertion systems have lower voltage and mass advantages/disadvantages than lithium-ion.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Candidate path for higher pack energy if pressure, rate, safety, and cycle-life issues are solved.

material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Full-cell proxy for lithium-metal solid-state system, not audited stack data.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Solid-state full-cell hypothesis with sulfide electrolyte and lithium-metal interface assumptions.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Lithium-metal negative electrode plus high-voltage cathode proxy; interfaces and pressure not solved by this estimate.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Safety-oriented solid-state branch, with manufacturability and interface risk still central.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: Published solid-state context exists, but no audited aviation duty-cycle measurement is linked.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Full-cell proxy for oxide-electrolyte lithium-metal system, not audited stack data.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Solid-state full-cell hypothesis with oxide electrolyte and lithium-metal interface assumptions.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Lithium-metal negative electrode plus high-voltage cathode proxy; ceramic processing and interfaces dominate uncertainty.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Upper-bound thought experiment for impossible/unknown region visualization.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

implied_pack_Wh_kg_range.range_basis: Assumption sensitivity bracket only; not statistical uncertainty and not validated performance.

material_candidate_cards.measured_basis: No audited aviation-relevant rechargeable pack measurement is linked.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Theoretical stress-test voltage; not a rechargeable aircraft cell rating.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Theoretical stress-test system with oxygen management, reversibility, and air hardware unresolved.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Lithium-oxygen reaction has high theoretical energy, but rechargeable system mass and durability are unresolved.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Long-term aircraft integration concept if energy, stiffness, damage tolerance, and certification can be jointly demonstrated.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Architecture-only row intentionally lacks full-cell voltage and capacity.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Multifunctional structure concept; energy storage cannot be separated from structural mass without audited test data.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Effective aircraft mass benefit may matter more than standalone Wh/kg, so simple active-material energy is intentionally blocked.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Possible power, thermal, or conductive scaffold role; not a standalone aircraft energy solution.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Supercapacitive capacitance is not treated as battery specific capacity.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Carbon electrode or scaffold architecture; not a rechargeable aviation battery chemistry by itself.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: High surface-area carbon can support power and conductivity, but capacitance metrics do not translate directly to pack Wh/kg.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Hypothesis-tracking material for conductive scaffolds, anode supports, or hybrid supercapacitive components.
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.
material_candidate_cards.hemp_bast_fiber_guardrail: Exploratory carbon architecture; included for hypothesis tracking only. No validated aviation battery performance is claimed.
material_candidate_cards.nominal_voltage_note: Exploratory carbon architecture; included for hypothesis tracking only. No validated aviation battery performance is claimed.
material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Exploratory carbon scaffold or electrode architecture; not validated graphene, not a full cell, and not pack evidence.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Bast-fiber-derived activated or graphitic carbon may provide porous conductive structure, but no aviation battery energy model is supported.

material_candidate_cards.aviation_relevance: Low-priority speculative comparator for abundance and safety discussion.
material_candidate_cards.chemistry_family: Magnesium, calcium, and aluminum multivalent systems
material_candidate_cards.claim_boundary: Material screening diagnostic only. This row is not DFT proof, experimental validation, pack proof, or a candidate ranking.

material_candidate_cards.system_boundary: Non-aqueous aluminum-ion carbon cathode concept; not aviation cell or pack evidence.
material_candidate_cards.theoretical_basis: Carbon cathodes can host chloroaluminate species, but full-cell voltage, capacity, electrolyte mass, and cycle life remain limiting.

Materials Project rows are not battery performance measurements.
No Materials Project metadata may appear in audited measurement views.

what_would_need_to_be_true: Comparable full-cell measurements need uncertainty and system boundaries.
Pack mass accounting must include containment, thermal control, reserve, degradation, interconnect, and certification margins.
Material hypotheses need reproducible synthesis, cell build details, cycle life, abuse response, and aviation duty-cycle tests.
Hemp/bast-fiber carbon needs primary measurements and full-cell translation before any aviation battery performance claim.
Materials Project metadata needs experimental battery validation before it can influence performance evidence or ranking.
